# Session Handoff Template

Use this file at the end of a work session to help the next AI session continue quickly.

## 1) Goal And Scope
- Main goal for this session:
- Included work:
- Explicitly out of scope:

## 2) What Was Changed
- Files changed:
- High-level summary of behavior changes:
- Important implementation details:

## 3) Current State
- What is working now:
- What is partially complete:
- Known issues or limitations:

## 4) Verification Performed
- Commands run:
- Results:
- What was not tested:

## 5) Database / Data Impact
- Schema changes (if any):
- Migration or compatibility notes:
- Data cleanup performed:

## 6) Config / Runtime Notes
- Relevant config keys and values:
- Startup command:
- Port / environment assumptions:

## 7) Next Actions (Ordered)
1. 
2. 
3. 

## 8) Open Questions
- 

## 9) Risks To Watch
- 

## 10) Quick Resume Checklist
- [ ] Read AGENTS.md
- [ ] Read .github/copilot-instructions.md
- [ ] Run a compile check on touched files
- [ ] Reproduce current behavior in UI
- [ ] Continue from item 1 in Next Actions
